component.name: Man with the Skies
component.summary: An interactive text-based narrative on Linux

description.p: Man with the Skies is an original literary work written by Shehroze Ameen, presented as an interactive terminal-based reading experience on Linux. The reader navigates a non-linear journal across 91 pages, encountering characters, choices, and perspectives that reveal themselves gradually. Built entirely in Bash shell script under the La Compte imprint. Open source infrastructure, original content.
Initial release of Man with the Skies.
